title: tenn well Garden Wire with Cutter, 328 Feet Plant Twist Ties Wire for Gardening Climbing Plants, Vines, Shrubs and Flowers (Black)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY - Made of quality iron wire coated in plastic, the garden tie wire is flexible to twist and tie and of great durability and corrosion resistance
GREAT GARDEN HELPER - This plant twist ties is perfect for supporting tomatoes, cucumbers, vines, vegetables, shrubs and other climbing plants
SIZE - With 328 feet/ 100m for the length, the garden tie wire can be cut into any length you want and used in various occasions
WIDE APPLICATION - This twist ties wire also can be used to organize headphone lines, data cables, computer power lines as well as tying other packages and bags
CONVENIENT TO USE - A cutter is built in the tie wire so that you could insert the wire to the left and press to cut as you want and no scissors is needed
description: Product Description 328 feet garden tie wire is great for securing plants, vines, shrubs and flowers to trellis, stakes, or other supports. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS 1. Material: Iron wire and plastic 2. Length: 328 Feet / 100M 3. Color: Black USE OCCASIONS 1. The plant ties wire can be used to tie up tomato plants, flowers, vegetables, cucumbers or other climbing plants. 2. It also works great on organizing headphone lines, charging cables, power lines etc and it can also be used to tie up food bags and other package bags. 3. This tie wire is equipped with cutter, you could use it in garden, home or office to tie anything you want.
